title: Miso Soup
description: A traditional Japanese soup made with miso paste, dashi broth, and tofu. This comforting soup is perfect for a relaxing Sunday.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: In a large pot, combine dashi broth and wakame seaweed.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add tofu and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Stir in miso paste and soy sauce.
Cook for 1-2 minutes, until miso is fully dissolved.
Season with sesame oil and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with green onions.
